channel.title: yosef0x1 — vulnerability research
channel.description: CVE writeups and offensive security research by yosef0x1.

item.title: Unauthenticated RCE in GoAnywhere MFT via Insecure Deserialization
item.description: Pre-auth Java deserialization in LicenseResponseServlet, reachable via a crafted bundle parameter.

item.title: Bypassing URL Blacklists in Python urllib with a Leading Space
item.description: A whitespace-tolerant scheme parser disagrees with downstream allowlists. One byte slips past most SSRF defenses.

item.title: Path Traversal to RCE in the Openfire XMPP Server
item.description: Openfire normalizes ASCII traversal but trusts %u002e — enough for unauthenticated RCE via the plugin uploader.

item.title: Authentication Bypass & RCE in PaperCut MF/NG
item.description: Session puzzling in SetupCompleted lets an unauthenticated attacker reach the admin panel and pivot to RCE.

item.title: Windows Backup Service LPE — SYSTEM via Arbitrary File Delete
item.description: A TOCTOU race in the Windows Backup Service turns a low-priv delete primitive into a SYSTEM shell.

item.title: KeePass Password Theft via Malicious Config File
item.description: With write access to the XML config, an attacker silently exfiltrates the entire vault.

item.title: Arbitrary File Execution in Rust's webbrowser-rs via Crafted URLs
item.description: webbrowser-rs v0.8.2 hands user-supplied URLs straight to ShellExecuteW on Windows.

item.title: Unauthenticated RCE in GetSimple CMS via Path Traversal
item.description: Path traversal in the theme editor gives arbitrary file write — pair with an Apache disclosure for unauth RCE.
